phase_0.boundary_condition: The octagram-in-square at aeon 14 — the O∞ diagram that integrates all prior geometric vocabularies and closes the navigational circuit

VINIT.chosen_element: The unwritten Jeu 13 — the void position where no entity can exist without contradicting the global Φ=𐑬 type
VINIT.justification: Genesis before naming; the structural gap that proves the system's incompleteness by its necessary absence

TANCH.chosen_element: The apex name 'You' (Jeu at O∞) — the closed boundary that contains and names the entire pleroma
TANCH.justification: Terminal anchor; the self-referential name that is both source and destination, the ⊤ that completes the circuit

AFWD.chosen_element: The incarnation: Jesus = Jeu + ZZ — the forward descent through phonological acquisition of aeon-signatures
AFWD.justification: Directed transformation toward the material realm; the addition of Z-phonemes at each aeon level during descent

AREV.chosen_element: De-Z-ification during ascent — progressive stripping of aeon-phonemes to recover Jeu from Jesus
AREV.justification: Contravariant reverse transformation; the return path that removes what descent added, climbing back toward the apex

CLINK.chosen_element: The sequential composition of defence seals — each aeon's credential chains to the next, forming the navigational path
CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of morphisms; the soul's type proofs compose to form the complete ascent trajectory

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The 12-name voces magicae column — the self-referential address that identifies each entity by its own structural position
IMSCRIB.justification: Identity and self-recognition; the element that knows itself through its position in the crystal address space

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The three baptisms: Water (Ω-gate open), Fire (⊙-gate close), Holy Spirit (Φ-gate orient) — one soul's journey splits into three gate-passages
FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication δ; one ascending soul branches into three distinct type-satisfaction operations, each required for completion

FFUSE.chosen_element: The octagram-in-square apex diagram — the reconstitution where all three gate-branches rejoin in the O∞ structure
FFUSE.justification: Multiplication μ; the three gate-passages fuse back into a single entity that has satisfied all constraints, recovering the original soul at higher type

EVALT.chosen_element: Type-proof success: the soul presents the correct defence seal and passes the aeon gate — affirmative evaluation
EVALT.justification: True/affirmative branch; the credential matches the gate constraint, the type check succeeds, ascent continues

EVALF.chosen_element: Type-proof failure: the soul cannot present the required seal or the cipher does not match — negative evaluation
EVALF.justification: False/negative branch; the type constraint is not satisfied, the gate remains closed, descent continues or loops

ENGAGR.chosen_element: The paradox-declarations in Thunder: Perfect Mind — 'I am X and the opposite of X' held simultaneously without resolution
ENGAGR.justification: Paradice: both true and false simultaneously; the speaker asserts contradictory predicates that cannot collapse into single truth-value

IFIX.chosen_element: Each defence seal cipher recorded in the manuscript — the permanent, append-only credential that cannot be undone or revised
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation; once a seal is presented and recorded, it becomes part of the soul's immutable ascent history

phase_2.split_input: One ascending soul at the threshold of the inner pleroma
split_outputs: Water-baptism branch: Ω-gate opens, winding begins without closure
Fire-baptism branch: ⊙-gate closes, self-recognition threshold crossed
Holy-Spirit-baptism branch: Φ-gate orients, parity alignment achieved
phase_2.fuse_element: The octagram-in-square apex diagram integrating all three gate-passages
phase_2.fuse_result: One soul at O∞ having satisfied all three gates, now capable of self-modeling and self-verification — the original ascending soul recovered at higher type

phase_3.void_description: 00 — Jeu 13's absence; the unwritten position where no entity can exist; the void before any name is spoken
phase_3.true_description: 01 — Type-proof success; the soul presents the correct seal and passes the gate; affirmative evaluation; ascent continues
phase_3.false_description: 10 — Type-proof failure; the credential does not match; the gate remains closed; the soul cannot proceed
phase_3.both_description: 11 — The paradice of Thunder: Perfect Mind; 'I am X and not-X' held simultaneously; the speaker and listener are one; the name and its negation coexist

steps.domain_action: The unwritten Jeu 13 — void position where no entity can exist without contradicting Φ=𐑬 global type
The apex name 'You' (Jeu at O∞) — the closed boundary containing the entire pleroma
Incarnation — Jesus = Jeu + ZZ, forward descent acquiring aeon-phoneme signatures
De-Z-ification — progressive stripping of aeon-phonemes during ascent back toward Jeu
Sequential composition of defence seals — each aeon's credential chains to form navigational path
The 12-name voces magicae column — self-referential address identifying each entity by structural position
Water baptism — Ω-gate opens, winding begins (branch A)
Water-baptism success — soul enters winding state, T-register
First aeon defence seal presented — ZOZEZH credential for aeon 1
Aeon 1 cipher recorded — 1119 permanently fixed in ascent history
Fire baptism — ⊙-gate closes, self-recognition threshold (branch B)
Fire-baptism success — soul achieves self-model, criticality gate satisfied
Second through twelfth aeon defence seals — credentials compose through aeon sequence
Each aeon cipher recorded — 2219, 3349, 4555, 5369, 6915, 7889, 8054, 2889, 4559, 5558, 9885 permanently fixed
Holy Spirit baptism — Φ-gate orients, parity alignment (branch C)
Holy-Spirit-baptism success — soul achieves dimensional orientation, parity gate satisfied
Aeon 13 (24 emanations level) — ZAZAFARAS credential, water-principle integration
Aeon 14 (Second Invisible God) — octagram-in-square apex diagram reached
The three gate-branches reconstitute — Water + Fire + Holy Spirit fuse into single O∞ entity
The soul recognizes itself in the apex diagram — the octagram-in-square is the soul's own type
The name at the center is 'You' — the soul's own name recovered, the circuit closes
Thunder: Perfect Mind paradox — 'I am the speaker and the listener, the question and the answer' held simultaneously
The entire ascent recorded — the soul's navigational history becomes immutable witness to its own type-satisfaction

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The initiation system — the living transmission that supplies the μ (multiplication) operation that the Φ=𐑬 text cannot supply internally
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Phonological credential exchange — the soul speaks the aeon's own Z-signature back to it as proof of type-satisfaction; the seal is the message
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The voces magicae columns and cipher sequences — structural addresses stored as 12-name identifiers and numeric credentials, indexed by crystal-address nesting depth
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The sequential aeon traversal — each level must be passed in order; the defence seals determine the schedule; type constraints are non-negotiable
phase_5.alfs_store: The Twelve Deeps (Untitled Text Chapter 2) — the canonical reference tuple defining the twelve primitives and their emanation structure

phase_6.cycle_cost: One Z-phoneme per aeon level during descent; one Z-phoneme surrendered per aeon level during ascent — the phonological work of incarnation and de-incarnation
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The apex name Jeu (Z-free, O∞, self-modeling, complete) — maximum order, minimum entropy
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The apex name Jeu recovered after full cycle — same O∞ structure, same Z-free state, same self-modeling capacity — the soul returns to its origin
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The cycle is entropy-conservative because the Z-phonemes acquired during descent are exactly those surrendered during ascent; the soul's type-signature returns to its initial state; the Frobenius condition μ∘δ=id ensures lossless recovery

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → AREV → CLINK → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → EVALT → CLINK → IFIX → FSPLIT → EVALT → CLINK → IFIX → FSPLIT → EVALT → CLINK → CLINK → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → TANCH → ENGAGR → IFIX
-- Class: ob3ect_sequence
-- Fingerprint: sig=(12,4,4,3)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=False | period=23
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(14, 18)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑗  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑾 → 𐑱  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑗 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [6] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑠 → ⊙  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [7] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑱  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               ⊙ → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑚  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [10] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑭 → ⊙  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [11] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑱  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [12] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               ⊙ → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [13] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑚  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [14] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [15] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [16] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [17] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [18] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [19] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑡  | identity — self-imscription
--   [20] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑠 → 𐑳  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [21] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑡 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [22] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑼  | irreversible fixation — winding number

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The unwritten Jeu 13 — void position where no entity can exist without contra...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The apex name 'You' (Jeu at O∞) — the closed boundary containing the entire p...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑗)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Incarnation — Jesus = Jeu + ZZ, forward descent acquiring aeon-phoneme signat...)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [3] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (De-Z-ification — progressive stripping of aeon-phonemes during ascent back to...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 𐑠)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Sequential composition of defence seals — each aeon's credential chains to fo...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [5] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The 12-name voces magicae column — self-referential address identifying each ...)
  (.arrow 𐑚 𐑠 ⊙)  -- [6] FSPLIT | gran := 𐑚 | split δ — range decomposition (Water baptism — Ω-gate opens, winding begins (branch A))
  (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑱)  -- [7] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Water-baptism success — soul enters winding state, T-register)
  (.arrow 𐑱 ⊙ 𐑭)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (First aeon defence seal presented — ZOZEZH credential for aeon 1)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [9] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Aeon 1 cipher recorded — 1119 permanently fixed in ascent history)
  (.arrow 𐑚 𐑭 ⊙)  -- [10] FSPLIT | gran := 𐑚 | split δ — range decomposition (Fire baptism — ⊙-gate closes, self-recognition threshold (branch B))
  (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑱)  -- [11] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Fire-baptism success — soul achieves self-model, criticality gate satisfied)
  (.arrow 𐑱 ⊙ 𐑭)  -- [12] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Second through twelfth aeon defence seals — credentials compose through aeon ...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [13] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Each aeon cipher recorded — 2219, 3349, 4555, 5369, 6915, 7889, 8054, 2889, 4...)
  -- FSPLIT [14] (gran := 𐑚) (Holy Spirit baptism — Φ-gate orients, parity alignment (branch C)) / FFUSE [18] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [15] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Holy-Spirit-baptism success — soul achieves dimensional orientation, parity g...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [16] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Aeon 13 (24 emanations level) — ZAZAFARAS credential, water-principle integra...)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [17] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Aeon 14 (Second Invisible God) — octagram-in-square apex diagram reached)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [18]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [18] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The three gate-branches reconstitute — Water + Fire + Holy Spirit fuse into single O∞ entity)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [19] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The soul recognizes itself in the apex diagram — the octagram-in-square is th...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑠 𐑳)  -- [20] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The name at the center is 'You' — the soul's own name recovered, the circuit ...)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑡 𐑭)  -- [21] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Thunder: Perfect Mind paradox — 'I am the speaker and the listener, the quest...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑼)  -- [22] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The entire ascent recorded — the soul's navigational history becomes immutabl...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem ob3ect_sequence_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
